lo.term: ຄວາມວ່າງເປົ່າ (Void)

definition: The formless, undifferentiated state that existed before the cosmos, Realms, and natural law were established — a Daoist cosmological concept distinct from 'the Void,' which is empty space within an already-created cosmos, whereas Chaos precedes creation itself.
translationNote: Translate as 'Chaos' or 'Primordial Chaos.' Keep distinct from 'the Void' — Chaos is pre-creation and generative (the source cosmology emerges from it), while the Void is a lawless gap within an already-existing cosmic structure.
auditNotes: Drafted by Claude in a cross-category gap-fill pass. Not yet run through verification pipeline.

th.term: โกลาหล

my.term: ပရမ်းပတာ

km.term: ភាពវឹកវរ

lo.term: ຄວາມວຸ່ນວາຍ

definition: Goods, resources, or currency periodically owed by a Vassal or subordinate territory to their Liege or ruling power, formalizing a hierarchical political relationship. Failure to pay Tribute is a common trigger for conflict or loss of protection.
translationNote: Translate as 'Tribute.' Keep distinct from ordinary 'tax' — Tribute specifically flows upward within a political hierarchy (vassal to liege), not from citizen to state.
auditNotes: Drafted by Claude in a cross-category gap-fill pass. Not yet run through verification pipeline.

th.term: เครื่องบรรณาการ

my.term: အခွန်ဆက်ပစ္စည်း

km.term: សួយសារអាករ

lo.term: ເຄື່ອງບັນນາການ

definition: A permanent military force stationed within a City, Fiefdom, or Territory to defend it from monster incursions, rival Sects, or invading forces — a standard infrastructure element in Kingdom Building and base-management storylines.
translationNote: Translate as 'Garrison.' Use for a stationed defensive force specifically, not for an offensive army mobilized for a specific campaign.
auditNotes: Drafted by Claude in a cross-category gap-fill pass. Not yet run through verification pipeline.

th.term: ป้อมปราการ

my.term: တပ်စခန်း

km.term: យោធភូមិ

lo.term: ຄ້າຍທະຫານ

definition: The ruling authority to whom a Vassal owes Tribute, military service, and loyalty in exchange for protection and land rights — the counterpart role to 'Vassal' in a feudal Kingdom Building hierarchy.
translationNote: Translate as 'Liege' or 'Overlord.' Always pairs conceptually with 'Vassal' — the two terms define each other's position in the hierarchy and should stay terminologically consistent across a single work.
auditNotes: Drafted by Claude in a cross-category gap-fill pass. Not yet run through verification pipeline. Added specifically because 'Vassal' already existed with no counterpart term.

th.term: ท่านลอร์ด

my.term: သခင်ကြီး

km.term: ម្ចាស់

lo.term: ນາຍເໜືອຫົວ

definition: A legendary beast venerated as the spiritual ancestor or guardian symbol of an entire Clan, Sect, or civilization, rather than a personal companion bonded to a single tamer. Worshipped and drawn upon collectively rather than 'tamed' in the individual Soul Contract sense.
translationNote: Translate as 'Totem Beast.' Keep distinct from a personally-bonded companion beast under Soul Contract or Equality Contract — a Totem Beast's relationship is collective/civilizational, not individual.
auditNotes: Drafted by Claude in a cross-category gap-fill pass. Not yet run through verification pipeline.

th.term: สัตว์ศักดิ์สิทธิ์ประจำเผ่า

my.term: ကိုးကွယ်ရာသားရဲ

km.term: សត្វតូតែម

lo.term: ສັດໂຕເຕັມ

definition: A Class or profession title for a cultivator who specializes in taming, bonding with, and commanding Spirit Beasts or Demonic Beasts in battle, as distinguished from Beast Taming, which is the general activity/system all such characters use.
translationNote: Translate as 'Beast Master' or 'Beast Tamer.' Use for the professional title/Class specifically; use 'Beast Taming' for the underlying system or activity itself.
auditNotes: Drafted by Claude in a cross-category gap-fill pass. Not yet run through verification pipeline.
